emojiPicker.title: Summary emoji
emojiPicker.sub: Shown next to the zone icon and on the first line of its summary (Telegram, Push)

settings.title: Settings
settings.appearanceHint: The accent scheme is shared company-wide and set only by the Owner. Theme (light/dark) is a personal setting on each device, independent for everyone.
settings.textSizeHint: Changes text and UI element size across the whole cabinet on this device. Does not affect the staff app.
settings.languageHint: Shared across the whole company: interface language, timezone and currency.
settings.timezoneHint: Shared time zone for the owner and all employees.
settings.defaultShiftStartHint: Prefilled in the "Add shift" form in manual mode
settings.businessDayBoundaryHint: Submissions and advances/bonuses before this hour count as the previous day
settings.startWindowHint: How much earlier and later than the default time an employee can start a shift — shared between auto and manual mode
settings.startWindowBoundaryWarning: The tolerance window crosses the business-day boundary — a shift started in that early window will land in the previous business day in reports
settings.currencyHint: Currency sign shown next to money amounts in the owner cabinet and operator app.
settings.systemHint: General settings affecting the whole tenant.
settings.systemGoodsBalancePaymentHint: Allow clients to pay for goods using their balance
settings.systemPrintingHint: Turns on receipt printing capability — the printer itself is set up separately, per point or per device
settings.systemReceiptCompactHeaderHint: Logo on the left, tenant name and receipt title next to it — shorter on thermal paper
settings.systemOwnerHasPrinterHint: This browser/device has a printer — buttons to print the balance statement and other Owner documents will appear here. Cheap Bluetooth printers usually need a print service app (e.g. ESCPOS Bluetooth Print Service) — otherwise the printer won't appear in the Android print dialog.
settings.systemModulesHint: Turn off what you don’t use — simplifies the interface.
settings.systemSilentPrintHint: The app currently shows the system print dialog every time. Download and run the script — it creates a separate Desktop shortcut that prints instantly, with no dialog, and adds it to Windows startup (opens automatically on login). Once it's run, you can delete the script file — it's no longer needed.
settings.systemSilentPrintConfirmButton: Set up — dialog no longer appears

tasks.newTaskSub: The employee will see it on the home screen

reports.noZones: This point has no zones yet
reports.noOperators: No employee data for this period

admin.vapidSectionSub: VAPID keys for Web Push — platform-wide, generated once here.
admin.vapidRegenerateWarning: Regenerating invalidates every owner's current push subscriptions — they'll need to re-enable push.
admin.currentPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to confirm
admin.expiryHint: Empty = no expiry. The scheduler flips it to "Expired" automatically once the date passes.
admin.adminNotePlaceholder: Only visible to you, the owner never sees it
admin.fluentcartHint: Billing link — the webhook finds the tenant by this customer_id (or by owner email if this is still empty).
admin.limitOverridesHint: Empty = package limit (shown as the field's placeholder). Fill in to override just for this owner.
admin.unlimitedHint: Removes all 4 limits at once — independent of the package and the overrides below.
admin.impersonationBannerPrefix: You're logged in as admin, impersonating
admin.productIdFieldHint: The FluentCart product's WordPress post ID — the webhook uses it to match an order to a package.
admin.deleteOwnerHint: Irreversibly deletes the entire tenant: points, zones, assets, operations, instructions, employees
admin.deleteOwnerConfirmNamePrefix: Enter the company name to confirm:

dataCleanup.title: Data cleanup
dataCleanup.hint: Irreversible deletion of operation history. Points, zones, assets, tariffs and employees aren't affected.
dataCleanup.resultsHint: All results submissions, counter readings, Stays/Launches session data, and related revenue/expense entries in the money ledger.
dataCleanup.collectionsHint: All collection entries from the money ledger.
dataCleanup.shiftsHint: All shifts, advances, bonuses, and employee balance carryovers.
dataCleanup.changeFundHint: All change-fund top-up entries for zone cash registers.
dataCleanup.goodsHint: All Goods sales, restocks, revisions and cash reconciliations.
dataCleanup.clientsHint: All clients (wallets), their balance and top-up/spend history.
dataCleanup.fullWipeHint: Delete all the data above at once, in one action.
dataCleanup.confirmNamePrefix: Type the company name to confirm:

summaries.dailyCashCardSub: point total for the business day
summaries.zoneShowDeltaSub: how many rides happened in the period
summaries.zoneCompactSub: 2-column readings, short asset names — for Telegram
summaries.dailyCashEditorSub: Total for the whole point over the business day
summaries.modeEventSub: The summary goes out as soon as every active zone at the point has at least one results submission for today and no shifts remain open at the point. If either condition is never met for the whole day, the summary still goes out at the business-day boundary, flagged. Deactivated zones aren't part of the wait.
summaries.modeFixedSub: Every day at the given hour, regardless of shifts.
summaries.skipIfNoSubmissionsSub: stay quiet if the point didn't operate
summaries.updateOnLateSubmissionSub: edit the sent message instead of sending a new one
summaries.dcShowZoneBreakdownSub: each zone's revenue on its own line
summaries.dcShowCashOnHandLabel: Cash on hand at the point
summaries.dcShowCashOnHandSub: how much should be in the cash boxes
summaries.dcCompactSub: zones in 2 columns, no blank lines — for Telegram
summaries.shiftCloseEditorSub: Sent when an employee finishes work
summaries.scShowAdvanceSub: paid out during the shift, from the money ledger
summaries.scShowTotalSub: employee earnings: rate × hours + bonus − advance
summaries.scCompactSub: all fields on 1-2 lines — for Telegram
summaries.connectSheetSub: No tokens or setup — one tap
summaries.connectBotNotConfigured: The platform bot isn't set up yet — contact support.
summaries.connectWaitPrefix: Waiting for the bot to appear in the chat… Pick a chat in the Telegram window that opened. The pairing code
summaries.emailSheetSub: Summaries will be sent as emails to these addresses
summaries.emailAddressHint: You can enter several addresses separated by commas
summaries.emailNotConfiguredHint: Email isn't set up on the server yet — contact support.
summaries.emailTestOkSuffix: If it's not in your inbox, check Spam.
summaries.emailInvalidAddress: Check the address — it looks like there's a typo.
summaries.instructionAckCardSub: when an employee signs an instruction

pushSettings.title: Push notifications
pushSettings.sub: Short notifications on this device about new summaries
pushSettings.testSent: Test notification sent — check this device
pushSettings.unsupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications.
pushSettings.iosHint: On iPhone/iPad, push notifications only work after installing the app to the Home Screen ("Install" button on the login screen).
pushSettings.dailyCashSub: total for the point over the business day
pushSettings.shiftCloseSub: when an employee ends their shift
pushSettings.shiftCheckinSub: when an employee starts working (Auto mode)
pushSettings.instructionAckSub: when an employee signs an instruction
pushSettings.collectionSub: when a cash collection is recorded

errors.notSupported: This browser doesn't support push notifications.
errors.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied in the browser — enable it manually in site settings.
errors.serverError: Couldn't enable push notifications. Please try again.

home.welcomeHint: Sign in or create an account.
home.renameCompanyHint: Shown on the home screen and in reports
home.renameCompanySlugWarning: The company name is also used for the address of permanent links (Instructions, Landing).
home.updateSlugHint: The old address stops working directly (visitors get redirected) — replace it everywhere you shared it: QR code at the venue, social media, etc.

auth.pinJustSet: PIN saved. You can now sign in with it.
auth.deviceUnknownHint: No one has signed in on this device yet. Sign in with your login and password — after that, PIN sign-in will be available without an email or password.
auth.loginWithPassword: Sign in with login and password
auth.registerHint: After signing up you'll be able to set a PIN for quick sign-in.
auth.setPinHint: Once set, you'll be able to sign in using just the PIN. If you forget it, you can still sign in with email and password.
auth.forgotHint: Enter your email — we'll send a password reset link.
auth.devResetNotice: Email sending isn't configured yet, so in development mode the reset link is shown right here:
auth.resetLinkMissing: The password reset link is missing or incomplete.
auth.resetHint: After resetting your password you'll need to set a PIN again.
auth.activateDone: Device activated. Employees can now sign in on it with a PIN.
auth.activateErrorHint: If the device was already activated before, try signing in directly.
auth.activateLinkMissing: The activation link is missing or incomplete.
auth.operatorDeviceUnknownHint: This device isn't linked to any point yet. Contact the owner — they can activate the device via the install link/QR code.

points.title: Points
points.confirmDeleteDevice: Delete this device? The employee will no longer be able to sign in on it.
points.confirmDeletePoint: Delete this point along with all its zones and assets?
points.noPoints: No points yet — add the first one below.
points.pageSub: Locations where the zones are set up
points.newDeviceSub: Activation link for a tablet or phone at the point
points.roamingLabel: Roaming — one device for several points
points.roamingHint: The employee will be able to switch points right in the app, without a new activation link
points.hasPrinterHint: Printing is set up on this device — receipt and report print buttons will appear here. Cheap Bluetooth printers usually need a print service app (e.g. ESCPOS Bluetooth Print Service) — otherwise the printer won't appear in the Android print dialog.
points.coordsHint: Copy from Google Maps: right-click the point → coordinates
points.mapsUrlHint: Google Maps (including short maps.app.goo.gl/… links) or Yandex Maps — if set, used instead of coordinates for the "Open in Maps" button

zonesList.title: Zones
zonesList.noZones: No zones yet — add the first one below.
zonesList.newZoneSub: A group of attractions within a point
zonesList.accountingModeLaunchesHint: A ready ride count per submission
zonesList.accountingModeCashOnlyHint: No tariffs or assets — just the amount
zonesList.accountingModeTicketsHint: Ticket sales by order, redemption optional

zoneDetail.assetTariffEmptyHint: Add a tariff in the "Tariffs" card above first — you can link it later.
zoneDetail.assetTariffMissingWarning: No tariff selected — the asset can't start a launch
zoneDetail.initialReadingHint: Set the counter's current value if this asset was already in use before the app started tracking it — the next submission will count from this number instead of zero.
zoneDetail.initialReadingWarning: This asset already has real submissions — editing this recalculates the revenue of the very first one (used as the starting point); later submissions are unaffected.
zoneDetail.confirmDeleteZone: Delete this zone along with all its tariffs and assets?
zoneDetail.cashOnlyNote: "Cash only" mode: this zone doesn't need tariffs or assets — the employee just submits an amount.
zoneDetail.printReceiptHint: The operator will be able to print a receipt for the visitor after a stay/launch
zoneDetail.ticketRedemptionHint: Off — the system only knows sales, no statuses or redemption ("old-school")
zoneDetail.ticketVariantsEmptyError: Add at least one named variant
zoneDetail.gameRoomRateHint: Example: 1 ₽ — 45 minutes of stay will cost 45 ₽.
zoneDetail.gameRoomRoundingUpNote: Duration is rounded up to the full minute — the point never loses money on partial minutes.

abonements.title: Subscriptions
abonements.pageSub: “Pay → credit” — the difference is a bonus to the customer. The customer's balance is topped up on purchase and spent as a launch payment method.
abonements.creditBelowPriceError: The credited amount can't be less than the price
abonements.confirmDeleteAbonement: Delete this subscription? Past top-ups made with it stay in history.
abonements.confirmDeleteWallet: Delete this customer? Their transaction history will be deleted with them.
abonements.confirmDeleteWalletBalanceWarning: This customer still has money on their balance — it will be forfeited permanently:
abonements.broadcastHint: Sent to clients who connected the Telegram bot.

operators.title: Employees
operators.confirmDelete: Delete this employee permanently? Only possible if they have no results-submission, timesheet, or money-operation (advance/bonus) history yet.
operators.noOperators: No employees yet — add the first one below.
operators.newOperatorSub: The staff member will sign in with a PIN
operators.colorTagHint: Used in summaries, timesheets and reports
operators.deactivateOpenShiftWarning: This employee has an open shift — after deactivating, you can close it from their profile, in the “Work time” section
operators.overdraftHint: Allow this employee an advance beyond their balance (it goes negative)
operators.skipShiftStartWindowHint: For example, for an employee with an irregular schedule — the shared shift-start window won't apply to them
operators.timeTrackingModeHint: Manual — the employee enters start/end time themselves; Auto — time is recorded via the "Start/End shift" button on the server
operators.goodsAccessHint: Access to selling goods and cash reconciliation
operators.ticketsAccessHint: Access to selling tickets; redeeming tickets in already accessible zones works without this toggle

money.title: Money
money.readingsLinkHint: Calendar of results submissions by point
money.zoneBalancesLinkHint: How much should be on-site, and collection history
money.collectionPoolSettledSuffix: already taken by the operator earlier
money.noAdvancesBonuses: No advances or bonuses this month
money.deleteCollectionConfirm: Delete this collection? The zone balance will be recalculated. This cannot be undone.
money.collectionAdvanceToastSuffix: — will appear in the zone balance once results are submitted

readings.title: Daily results
readings.lockedNote: One of this zone's assets has a later submission. Only the last submission in the chain can be corrected.
readings.lockedNoteMode: This submission can't be edited or deleted in this accounting mode.
readings.autoRecalcHint: The delta and revenue will be recalculated automatically.
readings.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: the employee misread the counter
readings.deleteConfirmBody: The readings, amounts, and money-journal entries for this submission will be deleted. This action is logged and cannot be undone.

operatorApp.collectionGeneralHint: The amount is first split across zones proportional to their balance. Any leftover is swept from the Subscriptions/Goods till (if there's uncollected cash there), and whatever still doesn't fit becomes a "Collection advance".
operatorApp.collectionGeneralAmountLabel: Total amount handed to the owner
operatorApp.collectionPoolSettledSuffix: already taken by the operator earlier

workTime.title: Work time
workTime.closeShiftToggleHint: Shift is still open — turn this on to close it on the employee's behalf
workTime.shiftTooLongBanner: Shift not closed — contact the owner
workTime.markDepartureReminder: Don't forget to mark your departure in the Time tab
workTime.carryoverHint: A one-off balance adjustment — e.g. carrying over a starting balance from a previous system. Can be negative.
workTime.moduleDisabledNote: The Work Time module isn't enabled for your company
workTime.deleteShiftConfirm: Delete this shift? This can't be undone. Only the employee's most recent shift can be deleted.
workTime.deleteMoneyOpConfirm: Delete this entry? This can't be undone.

submit.noZonesConfigured: No zones configured for this point.
submit.enterReadingsSub: Tap an asset and enter its reading
submit.cashOnlySub: Enter the cash for this submission
submit.assetInactiveHint: Asset under repair — the reading can't be changed, the last known value is kept
submit.rolloverWarning: counter rolled over past 9999 — please check
submit.allZeroWarning: Everything is zero — is that right?
submit.queuedHint: No internet right now — data is saved on this device and will be sent automatically once the connection is back.
submit.zReportPreliminaryNote: preliminary, not yet confirmed by the server
submit.gameRoomSub: No readings needed — revenue is calculated from launches
submit.ticketsSub: No readings needed — revenue is calculated from sold orders

operatorApp.offlineQueueHint: Waiting to send: {count} submission(s) — will send automatically once online
operatorApp.offlineQueueDroppedHint: {count} queued submission(s) were rejected by the server and lost — please re-enter them manually

gameRoom.noAssetsYet: The owner hasn't added any assets to this zone yet
gameRoom.soundHintBody: Sound and vibration fire when a launch's time runs out — keep the app open
gameRoom.noPricingError: The zone's tariff hasn't been set by the owner yet
gameRoom.assetInactiveHint: The asset is paused — a new wristband can't be added
gameRoom.networkError: No connection to the server — the launch is not lost, try again
gameRoom.expiredBannerLabel: Timer running out — go to asset

abonement.clientNotFoundLabel: No client found with this phone number
abonement.noAbonementsError: The owner has not created any subscriptions yet
abonement.noSpendZonesError: No zones available for balance payment

operatorApp.collectionAdvanceToastSuffix: — will appear in the zone balance once results are submitted

install.hint: Install the app for quick access from your phone's home screen.
install.manualHintIOSSafari:
1. Tap Share at the bottom of Safari.
2. Choose "Add to Home Screen".
3. Confirm by tapping "Add".
install.manualHintIOSOther:
1. Tap the Share icon at the top of the screen.
2. Tap "More" (three dots).
3. Choose "Add to Home Screen" and confirm "Add".
install.manualHintAndroidChrome:
1. Tap the menu icon (three dots) in the top-right corner.
2. Choose "Add to Home Screen".
3. Confirm by tapping "Add".
install.manualHintAndroidSamsung:
1. Tap the menu icon (three dots) at the bottom.
2. Choose "Add page to" → "Home screen".
3. Confirm by tapping "Add".
install.manualHintAndroidEdge:
1. Tap the menu icon (≡) at the bottom right.
2. Choose "Add to phone".
3. Confirm by tapping "Install".
install.manualHintAndroidFirefox:
1. Tap the menu icon (three dots).
2. Choose "Install".
3. Confirm by tapping "Add to Home Screen".
install.manualHintAndroidOther: This browser may not support installing apps directly. Copy the page address and open it in Chrome — installation will work from there.
install.manualHintDesktop: Open your browser menu (usually ⋮ or ≡) and choose "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".

instructions.settingsHint: Staff instructions: public link, e-signature, acknowledgment log
instructions.archiveConfirmHint: The public link will stop working. Already collected acknowledgment records stay in the log.
instructions.deleteConfirmHint: This can't be undone: the instruction and all its versions will be permanently deleted.
instructions.deleteBlockedHint: Deletion unavailable — staff have already signed this instruction. Use Archive to hide it from new staff.
instructions.deleteRecordConfirmHint: The PDF and signature will be permanently deleted. The deletion itself stays in the audit log.
instructions.honestyCheckHint: The "Done" button stays disabled until the page is scrolled to the end

instructionsPublic.agreementText: I have read the entire instruction. Everything is clear to me. I agree to follow the requirements and rules mentioned in this instruction.
instructionsPublic.genericError: Something went wrong, please try again

landingPublic.defaultAbout: {tenantName} — ride rentals in {city}. We work so kids have fun and parents can relax.
landingPublic.defaultAboutNoCity: {tenantName} — ride rentals. We work so kids have fun and parents can relax.

landing.settingsHint: A public storefront for your business — built automatically, you add text and photos
landing.taglinePlaceholder: E.g. "The best electric cars in town"
landing.galleryHint: 5-10 photos, shown to landing page visitors
landing.zonesHint: Showcase photo and description for a zone card on the landing page. Without a photo the card shows no image.
landing.showPricesHint: Tariff prices on the public page — turn off if you don't want visitors to see them
landing.themeSectionHint: Visual style of the public page
landing.effectSectionHint: Decorative particles on the public page — off by default
landing.videoSectionHint: One YouTube video on the landing page, any link format
landing.ourFleetHint: Grid of assets with photos — only assets that have a photo uploaded
landing.ourFleetDisabledHint: No assets have a photo yet — upload a photo for at least one asset first
landing.noPublishedInstructionsHint: No published instructions yet — see the Instructions section
landing.seoVerificationHint: Paste the code or the whole verification tag — we'll strip anything extra automatically. Get it from Google Search Console, using the "HTML tag" verification method.
landing.seoCheckOgImage: There is a photo for social media previews
landing.seoCheckContacts: At least one contact method is set
landing.seoCheckLocation: At least one point has an address or working hours
landing.seoRecommendationsTitle: Checklist complete — where else to add the landing page
landing.seoRecommendationsHint: This improves visibility in local search and maps
landing.seoRecommendationSocialLinks: Website link in your social media profiles

summaryText.forcedIncompleteCompact: Forced — not all data may have arrived
summaryText.forcedIncompleteFull: Sent forcibly at the day boundary — not all data may have arrived.
summaryText.cashOnHand: Cash on hand at the point

goods.noTrackedGoods: No stock-tracked goods in this category
goods.lowStockThresholdHint: Optional — the tile gets a "Low" mark
goods.trackStockHint: Turn off for service items with no physical stock
goods.confirmArchiveGoods: Archive this item? It will stop selling, history is kept.
goods.selectPointHint: Pick a point to see stock
goods.confirmVoidSale: Void this sale? Stock and balance (if paid by balance) will be restored, this cannot be undone.
goods.confirmDeleteReconciliation: Delete this cash submission? This cannot be undone.

tickets.noVariantsYet: This zone's assets don't have price variants yet
tickets.orderNotFound: No order found with this number
tickets.redemptionDisabledHint: Redemption is off for this zone
